hero.title: Ranking
hero.subtitle: How BGTiers Mobile & Emulator lists work

sections.title: 🏆 Leaderboard scope
list: Each platform (Mobile and Emulator) has its own Top 20 only — ranks 1 through 20.
Order in the table is the official rank (#1 is the champion spotlight).
Players outside the Top 20 are not listed until they earn a spot.

sections.title: ⚔️ Tier grades (S → D)
list: S Tier — Elite · top performers on the list
A Tier — High · strong competitive level
B Tier — Mid · solid, consistent players
C Tier — Low · developing or inconsistent
D Tier — Entry · bottom of the current Top 20
paragraphs: Tiers reflect skill and placement for the current season, not lifetime history alone.

sections.title: 📱 Mobile vs 🖥️ Emulator
paragraphs: Rankings are tracked separately. A high Mobile rank does not carry over to Emulator (and vice versa). Use the tabs on the main page to switch lists.

sections.title: 🏅 Titles & Hall of Fame
list: Year titles (e.g. 2026 Top 3) mark where a player finished that year on that platform.
Hall of Fame records all-time #1 champions by year — separate from the live Top 20.

sections.title: 🔄 Updates & disputes
list: Lists are updated by the BGTiers staff after review (scrims, tournaments, and community input).
Check the Changelog in the menu for what changed each update.
Think a rank is wrong? Discuss in our Discord server — don't harass players.

sections.title: 🚫 Not allowed
list: Fake accounts, stat boosting, or paying for rank
Harassment based on placement or country
Leaking private Discord info from profiles
